markup_text: This is the one I made in   spring. We can drink it     soon.

markup_text: We are not busy working so Iwant to gather people here  to have a party.

markup_text: Say:the sound of burning    wood and the smell of the   smoke make you nostalgic:<LINE>don't they?

markup_text: Hey:it's just hit my mind   but there are as many peopleas there are stars:right?<LINE>So the probability of       meeting a certain person is basically one out of<LINE>millions. So I really thank God for having you at that  ranch.

markup_text: Will those stars still shinewhen we become really old?

label: Text_45A_Weather_CowsSaleYoungOnesMilk
markup_text: Cows on sale are young ones that can't milk. Takes <CTRL_B4><CTRL_B3>   days to grow large<LINE>enough for milking.         The key is to keep them awayfrom sickness:<LINE>Don't forget to feed.       Don't let them out when it  rains:lightening:hurricane.<LINE>Nothing works when they get wet in the morning.<LINE>They don't produce milk     for a while when they get   sick or are in bad mood.

label: Text_45B_Manual_EquipMilkerPointYButton
markup_text: Equip the milker and point  Y button to a cow to milk.  Only once a day.<LINE>Cow's affection rate        increases when being brushedor talked to.<LINE>Cows you devote your        affection to can produce    middle-sized and<LINE>large-sized milk.

label: Text_45C_Weather_CowsEatGrownGrassGrass
markup_text: Cows eat well grown grass.  When the grass is young:    it's like not feeding:<LINE>so be careful. Cut grass    makes fodder.  It's feed in rainy days and winter.<LINE>Don't run out of it.

label: Text_45D_Weather_ChickensLayOneEggDay
markup_text: Chickens lay one egg a day. It doesn't lay eggs for <CTRL_B5>   days when you forget<LINE>to feed or it gets wet in   the rain. They could be     blown away when you let<LINE>them outside during         hurricane. Possibly to be   eaten by wild dogs.

label: Text_45E_Animal_EggsBecomeChicksDayswhenIncubate
markup_text: Eggs become chicks in <CTRL_B5> dayswhen you incubate them. No  feed is necessary for<LINE>chicks. Chicks grow to      chickens in <$00B9> days.         If you increase the amount<LINE>of chickens: the feed will  run out so be careful
